\n<Naruto> \c[10] Hey Shizune, can I join you for yoga today?
\n<Shizune> \c[06]Oh, Lady Tsunade!\..\.. You're just in time!
\n<Tsunade> \c[14]\...\...You're both lucky that these clothes fit me just right.
\n<Shizune> \c[06]Wow, your attire is so cute! Where did you find it?
\n<Naruto> \c[10]I got it for her, believe it!
\n<Shizune> \c[06](Hey, why didn't he buy me a gift?)
\n<Naruto> \c[10]Amazing, Shizune, you are making great progress!
\n<Naruto> \c[10]Don't worry Obachan, we will teach you the way!
\n<Shizune> \c[06]That's right! Lady Tsunade, the key to yoga lies in consistency.
\n<Shizune> \c[06]Above all else, doing it every day will lead to success!
\n<Naruto> \c[10]Speaking of 'doing it'\...\... let me show you a secret move, Obachan!
\n<Tsunade> \c[14]Naruto.. are you sure this is a valid yoga pose?
\n<Naruto> \c[10]*muffled voice* Oh yeah, totally! Shizune will tell you how it's helped her a ton!
\n<Tsunade> \c[14](I don't know about this\...\... it appears wrong but feels\...\... indifferent)
\n<Tsunade> \c[14](Wait.. what's going on with me recently?)
\n<Shizune> \c[06]Tsunade, it's time to learn the next move!
\n<Shizune> \c[06]Come on over here and start by getting on all fours..
\n<Naruto> \c[10]Actually Obachan, you can make it better by arching your back a bit more like this!
\n<Tsunade> \c[14]Naruto, I need some space, time for a break.
\n<Naruto> \c[10](Hmm.. maybe I should go slower with Tsunade)
\n<Naruto> \c[10](The last thing I want is to push her further away)
\n<Shizune> \c[06]Why are you looking all sad? We still have our ultimate yoga pose to do, remember?
\n<Tsunade> \c[14](Hold on, what's the meaning of this? And why am I feeling... jealous??)
\n<Tsunade> \c[14](I'm not gonna let Shizune take control of Naruto)
\n<Naruto> \c[10]Alright listen here girls! This next movement is a more complicated setup.
\n<Naruto> \c[10]I-in fact, it's a special three-person position!
\n<Naruto> \c[10]That means, Shizune, you need to come back over here!
\n<Tsunade> \c[14](\...\...Aghh! I can't let her win over Naruto!)
\n<Naruto> \c[10](As much as I like Shizune, I have to stall her advance to reel in the bigger fish, Tsunade)
\n<Naruto> \c[10]\...\...Shizune, get in the correct position up here!
\n<Tsunade> \c[14](I'm sure as hell not gonna lose to Shizune!)
\n<Shizune> \c[06]Hey Naruto, who's doing better - me or Tsunade??
\n<Naruto> \c[10]Well, you right now, \...\...but if Tsunade speeds up a bit, she might take the win!
\n<Tsunade> \c[14](Wait.. what the hell am I doing?)
\n<Tsunade> \c[14](Now I see the trickery Naruto is pulling here and I'm done falling for it)
\n<Tsunade> \c[14]This is silly, I'm out of here.
\n<Shizune> \c[06]Don't worry Naruto\...\... why don't we continue alone?
\n<Naruto> \c[10]\...\...OK.. believe it! (Shit, you practically owe me after you blew it!)
\n<Shizune> \c[06]This time, I will take the lead\...\... so just sit back and relax!
\n<Shizune> \c[06]Yes I am daddy. This is your reward for being so nice to me!
\n<Naruto> \c[10]Damn, Shizune, you are a semen demon!
\n<Shizune> \c[06]Yes I am hehe.. Thanks Naruto, I really needed that!
